name: ExtensionMedicationRequest_RenderedDosageInstruction
title: R5: Full representation of the dosage instructions (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` has a context of MedicationRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Full representation of the dosage instructions (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` has a context of MedicationRequest based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationRequest`.
Element `MedicationRequest.renderedDosageInstruction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Full representation of the dosage instructions
element.definition: The full representation of the dose of the medication included in all dosage instructions.  To be used when multiple dosage instructions are included to represent complex dosing such as increasing or tapering doses.
